LayoutObject.name: HTML Close

Calculation.Text: List template::Number of media containers < 1 Or Media LI 1::Container file extension = "svg"
Case ( Media LI 1::Container file extension = "svg" ; "data:image/xml+svg," & TextDecode ( Media LI 1::Media container ; "utf-8" ) ; "")
List template::Number of media containers < 1 Or Media LI 1::Container file extension ≠ "svg"

StyledText.Data: <<Media LI 1::Container original filename>> Width <<Media LI 1::Container width>> px. Height: <<Media LI 1::Container height>> px. Size: <<Media LI 1::Container file size readable>>

Calculation.Text: Not SubtitleMedia ( Media LI 1::Container file extension )

LayoutObject.name: Value string 1

Calculation.Text: List template::Value 1 type ≠ "String" And List template::Value 1 type ≠ "Number" Or List template::Number of value fields = 0

ScriptReference.name: Add to IO array List item

LayoutObject.name: T1 Copy

Calculation.Text: List template::Value 1 type ≠ "Boolean" Or List template::Number of value fields = 0
Not PatternCount ( List template::Value 1 type ; "IO" ) Or List template::Number of value fields = 0
List template::Value 1 type ≠ "Color" Or List template::Number of value fields = 0
List template::Value 1 type ≠ "Color" Or List template::Number of value fields < 1

LayoutObject.name: WV

StyledText.Data: This item is not included in export.
<<Media LI 2::Container original filename>> Width <<Media LI 2::Container width>> px. Height: <<Media LI 2::Container height>> px. Size: <<Media LI 2::Container file size readable>>

Calculation.Text: Not SubtitleMedia ( Media LI 2::Container file extension )
List template::Value 1 type ≠ "Link" Or List template::Number of value fields < 1
SetProperty ( "link_id" ; FAT List item::Value 1 ) & SetProperty ( "callLayout" ; Get(layoutName ))
List template::Value 1 type ≠ "Link" Or List template::Number of value fields = 0
SetProperty ( "tab_name" ; "tab2" ) & SetProperty ( "field" ; GetFieldName ( FAT List item::LastAdaptiveSettingsTab ))
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator

SetProperty ( "tab_name" ; "tab2" ) & SetProperty ( "field" ; GetFieldName ( FAT List item::LastAdaptiveSettingsTab ))
SetProperty ( "tab_name" ; "tab3" ) & SetProperty ( "field" ; GetFieldName ( FAT Page item::LastAdaptiveSettingsTab ))
"Select for which IO context this tag should work in"
PatternCount (JSONGetElement ( FAT Tag Value @ PI::Tag Value JSON ; "valuelist_id" ) ; "funkis-cloud")
"How will this page item behave if the user doesn't have the tag active?"
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator
Count ( FAT Score variable::PrimaryKey )=0 Or isTranslator
SetProperty ( "caller" ; "List card" ) & SetProperty ( "tag_key" ; FAT Tag @ List::PrimaryKey )& SetProperty ( "level" ; FAT Tag @ List::Level )

List template::Value 1 type ≠ "Link" Or List template::Number of value fields < 2

LayoutObject.name: Color V1

Calculation.Text: List template::Value 1 type ≠ "Color" Or List template::Number of value fields = 0 Or Platform ≠ "Desktop"

LayoutObject.name: Color V2

Calculation.Text: List template::Value 2 type ≠ "Color" Or List template::Number of value fields < 2 Or Platform ≠ "Desktop"

LayoutObject.name: Color V3

Calculation.Text: List template::Value 3 type ≠ "Color" Or List template::Number of value fields < 3 Or Platform ≠ "Desktop"
